docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CERTIFIED MAILING TO ALEX SLINYAK RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
OEX DISCH. IN COURT; ALL PARTIES APPEARED

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO SET-ASIDE AND DISMISS JUDGMENT OF AUG-18-2003, GRANTED
